title: selaginella breweriana
intro: Selaginella breweriana, also known as Brewer's spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its small, scale-like leaves and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Selaginella breweriana often involve drying and processing the plant's leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
